text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a scrimmage on the beach, and Oguri Cap
has registered for the 2,000-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I never expected to see those two to have a
showdown so soon!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think'll win? Creek or Oguri? I can't
wait to find out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? That's a lot of spectators...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're right. Maybe they're all taking a break?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I can't see anythin'! Sorry, but ya gotta let
me through! I'm goin' up front!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's Oguri's trainer! Mind if I grab this seat
next to ya?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe a simple race like this could draw
such a big crowd! Oguri and Creek are seriously
somethin' else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder. Oguri Cap has grown in both skill
and popularity recently, and now she's facing off
against Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh well, never mind that. Let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sure thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They kick into the scorching sandy beach and
launch off at the exact same time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap starts off in the lead.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Cough. This sand is really somethin'! But I got high hopes for Oguri. She's used to dirt courses!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Creek's laggin' behind! Has Oguri's sprint start
clinched this for her?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't be such a dummy, Inari! Ya know Creek's
only just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... Oguri's fast—but I can't let her beat me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Tamamo Cross predicted, Super Creek
gradually begins to close the gap around the
halfway mark.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hrk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
They're neck and neck! Oguri and Creek are neck
and neck!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew, now it's gettin' excitin'! Who's gonna take
the lead in the final stretch?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Creek! Give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And in the end...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... We... tied...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both slide across the finish line at the exact
same time. In the end, neither of them were able
to take the win. However...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... I thought I'd be able to overtake you at
the end, but I guess I underestimated you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're a real star, Oguri. I learned a lot from you
today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I hope we get to race each other again. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: If the race were just 500 meters longer...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap silently watches Super Creek walk
away.
